mapper.select:
SELECT DCMN_ID , DCMN_NM , DCMN_CON , DEL_YN , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_DCMN_INFO_M WHERE 1=1 AND DEL_YN = 'N'
AND ( UPPER(DCMN_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchContent}) || '%' OR UPPER(DCMN_CON) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchContent}) || '%' )
AND UPPER(RGSN_USER_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchUser}) || '%'
ORDER BY RGSN_TS DESC
SELECT DCMN_ID , DCMN_NM , DCMN_CON , DEL_YN , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_DCMN_INFO_M WHERE 1=1 AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND DCMN_ID = #{dcmnId}

SELECT A.DCMN_ID , A.ATCH_ID , B.FILE_ID , B.FILE_NM , A.RGSN_USER_ID , A.RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_DCMN_ATCH_R A LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M B ON A.ATCH_ID = B.FILE_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.DCMN_ID = #{dcmnId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOX_IVT_DCMN_INFO_M SET DEL_YN = 'Y' , AMNN_USER_ID = #{params.amnnUserId} , AMNN_TS = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE 1=1 AND DCMN_ID = #{params.dcmnId}
